news.summary: Dutchman Hans Compter travelled around the world to deliver the Austin to Cathleen Hourie in Orkney.

news.headline: Pentagon says about 140 troops wounded, 8 severely, in war with Iran
news.summary: The vast majority of the wounded had minor injuries, a Pentagon spokesman said. The toll is higher than previously disclosed.

news.headline: At least six dead in Switzerland bus fire
news.summary: Police do not yet know the cause of the fire in the western Fribourg canton, which also injured a number of people.

news.headline: Late Yamal penalty earns Barcelona draw at Newcastle in Champions League
news.summary: Barcelona needed Lamine Yamal's penalty with the last kick of the game to cancel out Harvey Barnes's opener.
